title: pelargonium × lilacinum
intro: Pelargonium × lilacinum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its fragrant, pink to lilac flowers and aromatic leaves. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, stress, and digestive issues due to their high content of geraniol and linalool, two essential oils with known therapeutic benefits. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Rose Geranium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
